purpose: AI interactive short drama game creator prototype
current_status: Aliyun production is online at https://playdrama.tokenaicloud.com and passes deploy preflight, launch gate, commercial smoke, payment provider verification, online smoke, DB verification, and browser smoke. Netlify preview may still return usage_exceeded 503 and should not be used as the production health target.

last_takeover.local_browser_smoke: PASS: http://127.0.0.1:5177 renders the SMS-code login and creator workspace with no browser console warnings/errors.
last_takeover.api_readiness: PASS contract, blocked 16/17 because deployment-url requires APP_BASE_URL to be HTTPS.
last_takeover.local_launch_gate: NO-GO: only missing APP_BASE_URL public HTTPS domain.
last_takeover.netlify_public_probe: FAIL: https://playdrama-studio-preview.netlify.app and /api/health return HTTP 503 {error: usage_exceeded}; this is a Netlify quota/platform gate, not an app handler response.
last_takeover.code_fix: Production frontend and deploy preflight now ignore localhost/127.0.0.1 VITE API bases and use same-origin /api instead.
last_takeover.release_note: Generate Aliyun handoff zip with deploy/create-aliyun-release.ps1 and keep the SHA256 checksum beside the zip in output/release.
last_takeover.production_checks: PASS: deploy:preflight 8/8, launch:gate GO, payment:provider:verify 8/8, commercial:smoke 13/13, online:smoke 3/3, browser smoke no console warnings/errors.
last_takeover.ssh_note: SSH access restored by adding lingbase-codex-deploy public key to ECS root.
last_takeover.heartbeat_20260526: PASS: production commercial smoke 13/13; launch gate GO; deploy preflight GO with PLAYDRAMA_DEPLOY_TARGET=aliyun after script alignment.

netlify_preview.verified_result: Current Netlify deploy state is ready, but public HTTP probes return 503 usage_exceeded before app routing. Last known successful launch check was 2026-05-21; treat it as stale until Netlify usage is restored and checks are rerun.

database.provider: Aliyun RDS PostgreSQL locally; Netlify preview uses configured cloud Postgres environment
database.verified_result: Local npm run db:verify PASS (33/33); local /api/health storage.driver=postgres and productionReady=true

auth.verified_result: Local /api/health reports sms-code auth, Tencent SMS configured, and auth readiness PASS

netlify_preview.commercial_note: Do not rely on the Netlify preview while it returns usage_exceeded. Restore Netlify usage/billing or deploy the existing cloud-server/Aliyun package, then rerun deploy:preflight, launch:gate, and commercial:smoke against the public HTTPS URL.

next_slice: Run a human real-business smoke: SMS login with a real phone, create/edit/publish a small work, trigger Qwen generation, run content safety, open player preview, perform a tiny Alipay payment and confirm callback unlocks paid ending. Keep using https://playdrama.tokenaicloud.com as the production health target; Netlify preview can remain paused until usage_exceeded is resolved.
handoff_rule: Read docs/HANDOFF.md first. Non-technical operators should follow docs/OPERATIONS_RUNBOOK.md and docs/production-readiness.md. Developers should follow docs/DEVELOPER_HANDOFF.md. AI employees should follow docs/AI_EMPLOYEE_BRIEF.md.
